changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_team AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_team_id, t.id AS team_id, t.uid AS team_uid, t.code AS team_code, t.name AS team_name, t.activity_id, act.uid AS activity_uid, t.disabled, COALESCE(t.form_permissions, '[]'::jsonb) AS template_permissions_jsonb, t.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(t.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(t.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.team t LEFT JOIN public.activity act ON act.id = t.activity_id;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_team_template_permission AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS id, t.uid AS team_uid, t.id AS team_id, fp ->> 'form' AS template_uid, (fp -> 'permissions')::jsonb AS template_permissions_jsonb, t.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(t.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(t.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.team t, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(t.form_permissions, '[]'::jsonb)) fp;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_team_template_permission; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_team;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_team_slm ON analytics.dim_team (source_last_modified_at);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_team_slm;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_team_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_team (team_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_team_uid_uniq;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_team_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_team (source_last_modified_at, team_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_team_slm_uid;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_team_template_permission_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_team_template_permission (team_uid, template_uid);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_team_template_permission_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_team_template_permission (source_last_modified_at, team_uid);
